title: Agents
subtitle: Manage your OpenClaw agents and their channel ownership
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Create a new agent by name. ClawX will copy the main agent's workspace bootstrap files and runtime auth setup.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from ClawX? Existing workspace and session files will be left on disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: Each channel type has a single ClawX configuration. Saving a configured channel here moves ownership to this agent.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from ClawX? This deletes the current channel configuration.
